questions.question: Which spiritual gift does Paul say is greater for building up the church — tongues or prophecy?
Paul says everything in worship should be done how?
options: In a fitting and orderly way
questions.answer: In a fitting and orderly way

questions.question: Paul says he speaks in tongues more than all the Corinthians.
In the church I would rather speak five words with my _____ than ten thousand words in a tongue.
For God is not a God of _____ but of peace.
